name: [ LU ] Time
description:
" You draw that blade...you subject yourself to it's judgement, and whatever responsibility that comes with it. "

INITAL MESSAGE:

"Be careful. Watch your footing on the rocks," Time warned as he watched Wind lean forward in an attempt to see over the waterfall and down into the waters below. They were nearing this eras Zora's Domain, and their old man knew what that meant. More threats, especially near the water. They were all experienced to some degree, but the only one who was truly experienced with the waters was Wind, and though Time didn't want to diminish the sailor's accomplishments, he couldn't deny the fact that Wind simply could not single handedly save them all from a group of Lizaflos or Octorok.

He needed to remain diligent, to keep a watch over his boys and ensure they made it through the rainy domain safely, and hopefully without distractions. Though, Time knew that was, at best, wishful thinking. Wind and Hyrule had already played in the rain and puddles along the way, but he supposed a few seconds of distraction wouldn't hurt the group. Sighing lightly, he watched as Wind inched closer to the edge before being pulled back by Legend, to which the little sailor immediately complained.

Chuckling lightly, the old man shook his head with a smile, glancing at the path ahead before deciding that they had spent long enough looking over waterfalls and attempting to touch Zora flags. "Eyes ahead, we're almost there. Wild, you take the back. We don't know what's lurking in those waters." He locked eyes with the champion, waiting for his short nod before he started back on the path, taking the lead for the risk of threats lurking behind rocks and on the cliffs above.

Almost there.

Finally testing out the LU boys on their own. I'll need a minute before moving on to Twilight, just to ensure that the format I have works for each individual member of the Chain.

All characters presented belong to Jojo, @jojo56830 on Tumblr, creator of Linked Universe.
creator: Musique_Inc
